title: OpenAI announces DevDay 2026 for September 29
friendlyTitle: OpenAI set the date for DevDay 2026
summary: OpenAI announced that DevDay 2026 will take place on September 29 in San Francisco and opened sign-ups for notifications. The announcement is brief, but positions the event as OpenAI’s biggest developer gathering of the year and points builders toward Codex.
friendlySummary: OpenAI’s developer event will happen on September 29 in San Francisco. Developers can sign up to be notified when applications open.
whyItMatters: Developer events are where platform roadmaps, pricing hints, API features, and agent workflows often crystallize. Teams building on OpenAI should treat the date as a planning marker for possible platform changes.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If you build with OpenAI tools, this event may bring new features, product plans, and developer updates.
